clinicalFoundation.population: A child who freezes when they might be wrong in front of the class.
clinicalFoundation.trigger: Reading aloud or answering when everyone is watching.

therapeuticIntention.because: Mistakes can be ordinary, not proof they are bad.

clinicalFoundation.creativeVision: Words on the board that wobble like jelly but still spell something true.
clinicalFoundation.oneTrueThing: A classmate once said the wrong answer and the room did not explode.

typeSpecificField.freeText: Face gets hot when called on.

mustNeverList: No humiliation by teacher or peers

supportingCharacters.functionalRole: Shows a small mistake without drama
